---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Clean Mac
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do today that is hard or
impossible?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Dependency check

Clean Mac is strictly **no-dependency / no-compiler**: pure vanilla JS, built-in
Python 3, locally vendored GSAP, no CDNs or build steps.

- [ ] This feature can be implemented **without** adding external npm/pip dependencies.
- [ ] This feature does **not** require a CDN or external network request.
- [ ] This feature does **not** introduce a build step or compiler.

> If you checked any box "no", explain below why the dependency is unavoidable so
> we can discuss before any code is written.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples, or links that clarify the request.
